# Lonely Guy
> se1 (lonely guy) - cs undergrad building towards autonomous robotic assistants through reinforcement learning, robotics, world models, embodied ai, and systems.

SE1 (Lonely Guy) is building toward autonomous robotic assistants through reinforcement learning, robotics, world models, embodied AI, LLM agents, and systems work.

## Navigation
- Home: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/
- Now: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/now
- Stack: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/stack
- Path: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/path
- Projects: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/projects
- Articles: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/articles
- Updates: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/updates
- Papers: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/papers
- Gallery: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/gallery
- Search index JSON: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/search-index.json
- Site index JSON: https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/site-index.json

## Projects
- [Project Halide](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/projects/project-halide): Small-model diagnostic workbench for damaged film scans using MiniCPM-V, Nemotron-Mini, strict validation, overlays, telemetry, and a Gradio light-table UI.
- [Cybersec OpenEnv](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/projects/cybersec-openenv): Long-horizon cyber-defense POMDP for training and evaluating small LLM SOC agents with GRPO, realistic attack chains, and reward-hacking resistant containment incentives.
- [Moirai](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/projects/moirai): Bare-metal C++ inference runtime concept for deploying quantized reinforcement-learning control policies with deterministic memory, packed weights, and CPU-cache-aware execution.
- [Breakout-DQN](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/projects/breakout-dqn): From-scratch Atari Breakout DQN study for building intuition around deep RL, preprocessing, replay, target networks, and early DeepMind-style agent design.
- [EcomEnv](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/projects/ecomenv): Experimental environment for modeling e-commerce decisions as an agent problem, useful for practicing environment design, reward shaping, and simulation thinking.

## Articles
- [Project Halide, Building A Small-Model Diagnostic Workbench For Damaged Film](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/articles/2026-06-16-project-halide): An open-weight film diagnostics workbench built around MiniCPM-V 4.6, Nemotron-Mini-4B, real negative failure cases, and a validator that became as important as the model.
- [Teaching a 1.5B LLM to be a SOC Analyst (Without Burning Down the Network)](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/articles/2026-05-01-llm-soc-analyst): Fine-tuning a 1.5B LLM with GRPO to defend against realistic enterprise attack chains, and the unexpected lessons learned from reward hacking.

## Updates
- [Project Moirai - Bare-Metal Embodied Control](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/updates/2026-05-01-moirai): Started working on a custom bare-metal C++ runtime for deploying quantized RL policies on edge hardware. No frameworks, no heap allocations, just raw AVX2 intrinsics.
- [Hackathons + Humanoid Simulation + UAV Conference + Breakout](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/updates/2026-04-11-updates): Qualified for some interesting hackathons, Good progress is being done on training the humanoid robot + Will be attending a UAV conference + Breakout might have to wait a bit.
- [playing around with an arm and a biped and rl](https://lonelyguy.vercel.app/updates/2026-03-18-biped): wanted to test the update page, so though might as well log about the biped, this is more of a random update.
